name: Roasted Habanero Salsa from Hell
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tablespoon of olive oil and garlic in a bowl and mix well.
2. Rub each tomato half with this mixture, then sprinkle with salt and freshly cracked pepper.
3. Roast in an oven preheated to 500°F (260°C) until the tomatoes begin to take on some serious color, about 15-20 minutes.
4. Remove from the oven and let cool to room temperature before dicing.
5. Meanwhile, grill the Habanero peppers over medium heat until slightly colored, about 2-3 minutes.
6. Remove the peppers from the fire and mince them carefully.
7. Be extremely cautious when handling the Habanero peppers; wear gloves while mincing them. If any juice gets on your skin, wash it off with a mild bleach solution to neutralize the capsaicin.
8. Do not rub your eyes, and wash your hands thoroughly after finishing.
9. In a medium bowl, combine the diced tomatoes, minced Habanero peppers, 1/4 cup olive oil, lime juice, and chopped cilantro. Mix well.
10. This salsa will keep, covered and refrigerated, for 5-6 weeks. No mold or bacteria will dare to come near this spicy mixture!
